heading: cyThe defendant needs to apply for help with their counterclaim fee
youNeedToApplyBeforeContinuing: cyYou need to apply for Help with Fees on the defendant’s behalf (GOV.UK, opens in new tab) before you can continue with this counterclaim.
enterCourtFormNumber: cyEnter the court form number 'XXX' when asked. This will be one of the first questions when you apply.
afterYouHaveApplied: cyAfter you have applied you will receive a Help with Fees reference number. You should enter the reference number when you return to this counterclaim.
ifYouReceiveAnyBenefit: cyIf the defendant receives any benefit that qualifies them for Help with Fees, you must include evidence of it when you apply online for help with their fees.
ifYouHaveYourHWFReference: cyIf you have their Help with Fees reference number you can enter it here.
